emails.subject: Re: Model
emails.body: Re: Model Here is an older project mode we used. Please do not show this to anyone. You can pull out some of the Caledonia information from this model. Let me know if you have any questions. Ben

emails.subject: Re: Model
emails.body: Re: Model Thanks for sending the model and being so prompt. I will email a copy of the caledonia transmission model after I confirm line data with Tapscott at 10am and clean up subsequent pages. Keep me informed of any developments on your end. Thanks.
